name: Statements: Ingest & Extract
description: Workflow A: Gmail trigger classifies incoming mail, extracts statement PDFs via OpenRouter vision, normalizes and upserts into Google Sheets

categories.description: A supplier/creditor account statement showing aged balances owed (current, 30, 60, 90, 120+ days), an amount due notice, or a statement of account with an attached PDF ledger.
A purchase order, order confirmation, quote, or invoice for newly purchased goods, not a creditor statement of an existing balance.
A debit note, debit advice, or bank debit notification.
A question, follow-up, or general correspondence with no document to extract.
